headline: Ford’s EV Reset And Modular Platform Shift Raise New Valuation Questions
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) CEO Jim Farley publicly acknowledged missteps in the company’s electric vehicle approach. The company is shifting to a new modular EV platform aimed at reducing complexity and cost. Ford is planning an affordable mid size electric pickup as part of this refreshed EV roadmap. These comments and plans outline a new chapter for Ford’s electrification efforts. For investors following NYSE:F, this update sits at the intersection of a traditional automaker and a fast evolving...
